bg.$description: Fallback .btn background before a variant applies.

fg.$description: Foreground for the text-style button variant.

border-danger.$description: Textarea invalid border (stronger red than Input).

outline.$description: LEGACY: day-hover outline + in-selecting-range text. Pending reconciliation.

highlight-custom.$description: LEGACY: highlighted-custom-1 demo color. Pending reconciliation.

shadow-color.$description: LEGACY: popper drop-shadow color operand (dart-sass legacy form of rgb(14 14 14 / 6%)). Pending reconciliation.

portal-overlay.$description: LEGACY: full-screen portal backdrop. Pending reconciliation.
